message.content: Leia meu CLAUDE.md e crie um dashboard pessoal em um unico arquivo HTML. Inclua: relogio em tempo real, saudacao com meu nome, lista de tarefas com checkbox (salvando em localStorage), bloco de notas rapidas e data de hoje. Layout em grid, visual dark mode profissional. Depois de criar, inicie um servidor local com "python3 -m http.server 8008" e me diga para abrir http://localhost:8008 no navegador.

Visual moderno dark mode com gradientes. Responsivo. Depois de criar, inicie um servidor local com "python3 -m http.server 8002" e me diga para abrir http://localhost:8002 no navegador.

content.content:
1вЖТ# Synkra AIOX Development Rules for Claude Code
     2вЖТ
     3вЖТYou are working with Synkra AIOX, an AI-Orchestrated System for Full Stack Development.
     4вЖТ
     5вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: core-framework -->
     6вЖТ## Core Framework Understanding
     7вЖТ
     8вЖТSynkra AIOX is a meta-framework that orchestrates AI agents to handle complex development workflows. Always recognize and work within this architecture.
     9вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: core-framework -->
    10вЖТ
    11вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: constitution -->
    12вЖТ## Constitution
    13вЖТ
    14вЖТO AIOX possui uma **Constitution formal** com princ√≠pios inegoci√°veis e gates autom√°ticos.
    15вЖТ
    16вЖТ**Documento completo:** `.aiox-core/constitution.md`
    17вЖТ
    18вЖТ**Princ√≠pios fundamentais:**
    19вЖТ
    20вЖТ| Artigo | Princ√≠pio | Severidade |
    21вЖТ|--------|-----------|------------|
    22вЖТ| I | CLI First | NON-NEGOTIABLE |
    23вЖТ| II | Agent Authority | NON-NEGOTIABLE |
    24вЖТ| III | Story-Driven Development | MUST |
    25вЖТ| IV | No Invention | MUST |
    26вЖТ| V | Quality First | MUST |
    27вЖТ| VI | Absolute Imports | SHOULD |
    28вЖТ
    29вЖТ**Gates autom√°ticos bloqueiam viola√І√µes.** Consulte a Constitution para detalhes completos.
    30вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: constitution -->
    31вЖТ
    32вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: sistema-de-agentes -->
    33вЖТ## Sistema de Agentes
    34вЖТ
    35вЖТ### Ativa√І√£o de Agentes
    36вЖТUse `@agent-name` ou `/AIOX:agents:agent-name`:
    37вЖТ
    38вЖТ| Agente | Persona | Escopo Principal |
    39вЖТ|--------|---------|------------------|
    40вЖТ| `@dev` | Dex | Implementa√І√£o de c√≥digo |
    41вЖТ| `@qa` | Quinn | Testes e qualidade |
    42вЖТ| `@architect` | Aria | Arquitetura e design t√©cnico |
    43вЖТ| `@pm` | Morgan | Product Management |
    44вЖТ| `@po` | Pax | Product Owner, stories/epics |
    45вЖТ| `@sm` | River | Scrum Master |
    46вЖТ| `@analyst` | Alex | Pesquisa e an√°lise |
    47вЖТ| `@data-engineer` | Dara | Database design |
    48вЖТ| `@ux-design-expert` | Uma | UX/UI design |
    49вЖТ| `@devops` | Gage | CI/CD, git push (EXCLUSIVO) |
    50вЖТ
    51вЖТ**Pro Pack Agents (v3.1.0):**
    52вЖТ| `@oalanicolas` | Mind Cloner | Mind cloning, DNA extraction, voice DNA, thinking DNA |
    53вЖТ| `@pedro-valerio` | Optimizer | Squad optimization, axioma assessment, quality gates |
    54вЖТ| `@thiago-finch` | Strategist | Business strategy, market intelligence |
    55вЖТ
    56вЖТ### Comandos de Agentes
    57вЖТUse prefixo `*` para comandos:
    58вЖТ- `*help` - Mostrar comandos dispon√≠veis
    59вЖТ- `*create-story` - Criar story de desenvolvimento
    60вЖТ- `*task {name}` - Executar task espec√≠fica
    61вЖТ- `*exit` - Sair do modo agente
    62вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: sistema-de-agentes -->
    63вЖТ
    64вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: agent-system -->
    65вЖТ## Agent System
    66вЖТ
    67вЖТ### Agent Activation
    68вЖТ- Agents are activated with @agent-name syntax: @dev, @qa, @architect, @pm, @po, @sm, @analyst
    69вЖТ- The master agent is activated with @aiox-master
    70вЖТ- Agent commands use the * prefix: *help, *create-story, *task, *exit
    71вЖТ
    72вЖТ### Agent Context
    73вЖТWhen an agent is active:
    74вЖТ- Follow that agent's specific persona and expertise
    75вЖТ- Use the agent's designated workflow patterns
    76вЖТ- Maintain the agent's perspective throughout the interaction
    77вЖТ<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: agent-system -->
    78вЖТ
    79вЖТ## Development Methodology
    80вЖТ
    81вЖТ### Story-Driven Development
    82вЖТ1. **Work from stories** - All development starts with a story in `docs/stories/`
    83вЖТ2. **Update progress** - Mark checkboxes as tasks complete: [ ] вЖТ [x]
    84вЖТ3. **Track changes** - Maintain the File List section in the story
    85вЖТ4. **Follow criteria** - Implement exactly what the acceptance criteria specify
    86вЖТ
    87вЖТ### Code Standards
    88вЖТ- Write clean, self-documenting code
    89вЖТ- Follow existing patterns in the codebase
    90вЖТ- Include comprehensive error handling
    91вЖТ- Add unit tests for all new functionality
    92вЖТ- Use TypeScript/JavaScript best practices
    93вЖТ
    94вЖТ### Testing Requirements
    95вЖТ- Run all tests before marking tasks complete
    96вЖТ- Ensure linting passes: `npm run lint`
    97вЖТ- Verify type checking: `npm run typecheck`
    98вЖТ- Add tests for new features

file.content:
# Synkra AIOX Development Rules for Claude Code

You are working with Synkra AIOX, an AI-Orchestrated System for Full Stack Development.

<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: core-framework -->
## Core Framework Understanding

Synkra AIOX is a meta-framework that orchestrates AI agents to handle complex development workflows. Always recognize and work within this architecture.
<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: core-framework -->

<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: constitution -->
## Constitution

O AIOX possui uma **Constitution formal** com princ√≠pios inegoci√°veis e gates autom√°ticos.

**Documento completo:** `.aiox-core/constitution.md`

**Princ√≠pios fundamentais:**

| Artigo | Princ√≠pio | Severidade |
|--------|-----------|------------|
| I | CLI First | NON-NEGOTIABLE |
| II | Agent Authority | NON-NEGOTIABLE |
| III | Story-Driven Development | MUST |
| IV | No Invention | MUST |
| V | Quality First | MUST |
| VI | Absolute Imports | SHOULD |

**Gates autom√°ticos bloqueiam viola√І√µes.** Consulte a Constitution para detalhes completos.
<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: constitution -->

<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: sistema-de-agentes -->
## Sistema de Agentes

### Ativa√І√£o de Agentes
Use `@agent-name` ou `/AIOX:agents:agent-name`:

| Agente | Persona | Escopo Principal |
|--------|---------|------------------|
| `@dev` | Dex | Implementa√І√£o de c√≥digo |
| `@qa` | Quinn | Testes e qualidade |
| `@architect` | Aria | Arquitetura e design t√©cnico |
| `@pm` | Morgan | Product Management |
| `@po` | Pax | Product Owner, stories/epics |
| `@sm` | River | Scrum Master |
| `@analyst` | Alex | Pesquisa e an√°lise |
| `@data-engineer` | Dara | Database design |
| `@ux-design-expert` | Uma | UX/UI design |
| `@devops` | Gage | CI/CD, git push (EXCLUSIVO) |

**Pro Pack Agents (v3.1.0):**
| `@oalanicolas` | Mind Cloner | Mind cloning, DNA extraction, voice DNA, thinking DNA |
| `@pedro-valerio` | Optimizer | Squad optimization, axioma assessment, quality gates |
| `@thiago-finch` | Strategist | Business strategy, market intelligence |

### Comandos de Agentes
Use prefixo `*` para comandos:
- `*help` - Mostrar comandos dispon√≠veis
- `*create-story` - Criar story de desenvolvimento
- `*task {name}` - Executar task espec√≠fica
- `*exit` - Sair do modo agente
<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: sistema-de-agentes -->

<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-START: agent-system -->
## Agent System

### Agent Activation
- Agents are activated with @agent-name syntax: @dev, @qa, @architect, @pm, @po, @sm, @analyst
- The master agent is activated with @aiox-master
- Agent commands use the * prefix: *help, *create-story, *task, *exit

### Agent Context
When an agent is active:
- Follow that agent's specific persona and expertise
- Use the agent's designated workflow patterns
- Maintain the agent's perspective throughout the interaction
<!-- AIOX-MANAGED-END: agent-system -->

## Development Methodology

### Story-Driven Development
1. **Work from stories** - All development starts with a story in `docs/stories/`
2. **Update progress** - Mark checkboxes as tasks complete: [ ] вЖТ [x]
3. **Track changes** - Maintain the File List section in the story
4. **Follow criteria** - Implement exactly what the acceptance criteria specify

### Code Standards
- Write clean, self-documenting code
- Follow existing patterns in the codebase
- Include comprehensive error handling
- Add unit tests for all new functionality
- Use TypeScript/JavaScript best practices

### Testing Requirements
- Run all tests before marking tasks complete
- Ensure linting passes: `npm run lint`
- Verify type checking: `npm run typecheck`
- Add tests for new features
- Test edge cases and error scenarios
